nasb.text: An evil man is ensnared by the transgression of his lips, But the righteous will escape from trouble.

esv.text: An evil man is ensnared by the transgression of his lips, but the righteous escapes from trouble.

cnv.text: 壞人嘴裡的過失，是自己的網羅； 但義人必脫離患難。

ccb.text: 恶人被自己的恶言所困， 但义人可以脱离险境。

csbs.text: 嘴唇的过犯是恶人的陷阱， 而义人必脱离患难。
